emails.subject: What is up dude?
emails.body: What is up dude? Can you believe this? I was hoping to call but the "peoplefinder" isn't working now. I was hoping to hear "FOR THE LOVE OF GOD!!!" one more time. Miller

emails.subject: RE: What is up dude?
emails.body: RE: What is up dude? Miller! For the love of JESUS! How are you. What's up with the layoffs? Absolutely amazing. I have seen it all now. To: Crandall, Sean

emails.subject: RE: What is up dude?
emails.body: it's like a big shit sandwich--every day is just another bite. Keep me in mind when you're VP of Pacificorp--we want to come back to Portland! To: Miller, Jeffrey
